title: China is trying to play peacemaker in the Iran war - will it work?
summary_full: It's a turnaround for Beijing, whose official response has been muted so far. Why is China stepping in now?
summary_public: It's a turnaround for Beijing, whose official response has been muted so far. Why is China stepping in now?
